positive: A whimsical and stylized forest scene viewed through a pair of oversized, retro-futuristic binoculars. The central focus is a group of bioluminescent, highly detailed mushrooms and various whimsical forest flora, rendered with clean silhouettes and strong, contrasting colors (deep indigo, emerald green, and soft yellow neon). The composition should be centered, ideal for repeating apparel pattern design. Style: Vector art, flat design mixed with delicate illustration, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets cosmic exploration. High contrast, thick outlines, crisp lines, minimal shading.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, bokeh, blur, noise, low resolution, watermark, text, logos, signature, artifact, deformed, mutated, messy, messy lines, extra limbs, bad anatomy, copyright, recognizable characters
